{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Shi Jaran
| aliases = Shi Jaran, Jaran
| children = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Kelsa]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Shi family]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Serpent's Grave|Serpent’s Grave]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Wei Shi Jaran Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi Jaran is a member of the [[Wei clan]] and the father of Wei Shi [[Lindon]]. He carries significant physical scars from past conflicts, including a permanent smirk caused by a lip injury and a limp that necessitates the use of a cane. His injuries include a scar from being pierced by a [[Kazan]] spear and an acid burn from the [[Li clan]]. Despite these physical limitations, Jaran is characterized by a resilient and sometimes scornful personality, often using humor or sharp words to mask his struggles. He is a man of experience who values strategy and mental fortitude in combat, frequently advising his son on the importance of wisdom over reckless bravery. Throughout various stages of his life, Jaran has navigated clan politics and personal hardships, eventually relocating to the [[Blackflame Empire]] with his wife, [[Seisha]], and daughter, [[Kelsa]]. While he has faced moments of deep despair, he remains a protective and proud father, even as he deals with the physical agony of his old wounds.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi Jaran, whose name is inscribed on an iron tablet used by members of the [[Shi family]], was once considered one of the most promising [[sacred artists]] within the clan. He is the father of [[Lindon]] and bears a permanent smirk from a scar at the corner of his lip, as well as a limp that necessitates the use of a cane. During an arena match, he watched the proceedings with fury. Additionally, he appeared within [[Lindon]]'s dream to observe a battle between the [[Jades]] and Markuth.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] has a lip scarred into an eternal smirk and a limp that requires a cane from participating in the [[Festival]] before last.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran has a scar at the corner of his lip.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran uses a cane.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Shi Jaran is [[Lindon]]'s father.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran is [[Lindon]]'s father.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran was once one of the most promising [[sacred artists]] in the clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran is watching a battle between Markuth and the [[Jades]] in [[Lindon]]'s dream.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] is the name on an iron tablet used by members of the [[Shi family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Jaran watched the arena match in fury.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] was blinded by the [[Heaven's Glory]] School as punishment.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] is [[Lindon]]'s father.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] has a bad leg.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Jaran is [[Wei Shi Jaran]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Jaran is juggling his cane.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Jaran has a wounded leg.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] restored Jaran’s eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] repaired the shape of Jaran’s long-twisted leg.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Wei Shi Jaran]] holds a spear and lives in Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Jaran suspected [[Lindon]] caused the current situation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Jaran has replacement eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Jaran is [[Kelsa's father]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Jaran is part of [[Lindon]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"These people looked like his parents, so familiar he could never mistake them."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"His bad leg was stretched out on a chair, his cane held loosely across his lap."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Shi family]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
